description:
Goal
Move CLI, REPL, test-support, and documentation onto the compiler::World API and delete the superseded staged-preparation affordances.

Signal
- Production entrypoints operate through a mutable World.
- Test helpers and targeted suites assert against world state instead of staged structs.
- Agent docs describe World as the authoritative compiler spine and note what temporary helpers were removed.
- The targeted pipeline and entrypoint test matrix passes.

Strategy
- Switch higher-level callers after World owns both execution and native state.
- Remove temporary compatibility wrappers once callers are migrated.
- Update agent docs alongside the final API shape.
title: Compiler World: migrate entrypoints, tests, and docs
